info.name: LEAD-93 v2 Contract - All APIs
info.description: 25 unique v2 endpoints from the current LEAD-93 API Contract. The collection contains 27 executable requests because POST /publish covers existing Draft Publish Now, existing Draft Schedule and direct Publish of a new Template. Existing App consumers continue to use v1, while Web uses v2 for all 25 endpoints. Every request includes contract assertions. Write requests require enableWriteTests=true. Run first against the bundled local mock.

item.name: 01 Template Queries
item.description: Enhanced v2 list and detail endpoints.

exec: pm.test('HTTP status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
let json;
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Business response is successful', function () { pm.expect(json.responseCode).to.eql('00000000'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Published page contract', function () { pm.expect(json.data.dataList).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.data.pageNo).to.be.a('number'); });

pm.test('Admin page contract', function () { pm.expect(json.data.dataList).to.be.an('array'); });

pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Detail includes current Template metadata and Copy source fields', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(json.data).to.have.property('categoryId'); pm.expect(json.data.subCategoryIds).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(json.data.tagMap).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(json.data).to.have.property('copyFromEmailCode'); });

pm.test('Published detail is Active', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(json.data.versionStatus).to.eql(1); });

pm.test('Channel list uses channelCode/channelName', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('array'); json.data.forEach(item => { pm.expect(item.channelCode).to.exist; pm.expect(item.channelName).to.exist; }); });

item.name: NEW-10 Copy and Create - first Save Draft

exec: if (pm.variables.get('enableWriteTests') !== 'true') {
console.warn('Write request skipped. Set enableWriteTests=true in the selected environment.');
pm.execution.skipRequest();
pm.test('HTTP status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
let json;
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Business response is successful', function () { pm.expect(json.responseCode).to.eql('00000000'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Independent V1 Draft is returned', function () { pm.expect(json.data.emailCode).to.exist; pm.expect(String(json.data.emailCode)).not.to.eql(pm.variables.get('emailCode')); pm.expect(json.data.version).to.eql('V1'); pm.expect(json.data.versionStatus).to.eql(3); });

item.name: EX-16A Publish Existing Draft Now - publish

body.raw:
{
  "moduleCode": "COMMUNICATION",
  "moduleCodeName": "Communications",
  "scenarioCode": "TEMPLATE_LIBRARY",
  "emailCode": "{{emailCode}}",
  "targetVersion": "{{draftVersion}}",
  "emailName": "Retirement review invitation",
  "description": "Invitation for the annual retirement review",
  "title": "Your retirement review",
  "editMode": "HTML",
  "emailContent": "MOCK_AES_CONTENT",
  "emailContentKey": "MOCK_AES_KEY",
  "textContent": "Your retirement review",
  "fileKeys": "",
  "thumbnailKey": null,
  "channelMap": {},
  "isCustomBranding": "0",
  "effectiveWay": 0,
  "effectiveFrom": null
}

item.name: 05 Tags and Metadata
item.description: New read-only taxonomy and current Template metadata write APIs.

exec: pm.test('HTTP status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
let json;
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Business response is successful', function () { pm.expect(json.responseCode).to.eql('00000000'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Four mandatory tag groups returned', function () { const expected = ['CONTENT_TYPE', 'TRIGGER', 'LIFECYCLE_STAGE', 'FINANCIAL_NEED']; pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('array').with.lengthOf(4); pm.expect(json.data.map(group => group.groupCode)).to.have.members(expected); pm.expect(json.data.every(group => Number(group.isMandatory ?? group.mandatory) === 1)).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('Trigger allows at most five selections', function () { const trigger = json.data.find(group => group.groupCode === 'TRIGGER'); pm.expect(trigger.maxSelections).to.eql(5); });
if (pm.variables.get('enableWriteTests') !== 'true') {
console.warn('Write request skipped. Set enableWriteTests=true in the selected environment.');
pm.execution.skipRequest();
pm.test('HTTP status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
let json;
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Business response is successful', function () { pm.expect(json.responseCode).to.eql('00000000'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Batch reassignment command returns no body', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.eql(null); });

item.name: 06 Error Scenarios
item.description: Validation and business error contract responses.

item.name: ERR-01 Publish Validation Error - Missing Required Fields

exec: pm.test('HTTP status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
let json;
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Publish validation failure returned', function () { pm.expect(json.responseCode).not.to.eql('00000000'); });
pm.test('Field errors array contains categoryId failure', function () { const fields = (json.data.fieldErrors || []).map(f => f.field); pm.expect(fields).to.include('categoryId'); });
pm.test('HTTP status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
let json;
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Version conflict error envelope returned', function () { pm.expect(json.data.errorType).to.eql('VERSION_CONFLICT'); pm.expect(json.data.retryable).to.eql(true); });

item.name: ERR-03 Duplicate Subcategory Name in Parent

exec: pm.test('HTTP status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
let json;
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Subcategory name duplicate error returned', function () { const code = json.data.fieldErrors[0]?.code; pm.expect(code).to.be.oneOf(['CATEGORY_NAME_DUPLICATE', 'DUPLICATE']); });

item.name: ERR-04 Duplicate Template Title in Category

body.raw:
{
  "moduleCode": "COMMUNICATION",
  "moduleCodeName": "Communications",
  "scenarioCode": "TEMPLATE_LIBRARY",
  "emailName": "Retirement review invitation",
  "description": "Invitation for the annual retirement review",
  "effectiveWay": 0,
  "effectiveFrom": null,
  "effectiveUntil": null,
  "title": "Your retirement review",
  "editMode": "HTML",
  "emailContent": "MOCK_AES_CONTENT",
  "textContent": "Your retirement review",
  "fileKeys": "",
  "emailContentKey": "MOCK_AES_KEY",
  "isDraft": 1,
  "version": "{{draftVersion}}",
  "thumbnailKey": null,
  "channelMap": {},
  "isCustomBranding": "0",
  "categoryId": "1001"
}

exec: pm.test('HTTP status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
let json;
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Template title duplicate error returned', function () { pm.expect(json.data.errorType).to.eql('TEMPLATE_NAME_DUPLICATE'); const fields = (json.data.fieldErrors || []).map(f => f.field); pm.expect(fields).to.include('emailName'); });
pm.test('HTTP status is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
let json;
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Self migration target returns INVALID_MIGRATION_TARGET', function () { pm.expect(json.data.errorType).to.eql('INVALID_MIGRATION_TARGET'); });
